backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping four navigation/header features to their implementing source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component composing the Header, a hero section, a feature cards grid, interaction instructions, and a footer using a dark forest-green theme.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Full-width sticky header component implementing desktop hover-driven 3-level dropdown/flyout navigation and a mobile hamburger accordion menu with all three levels expandable inline.
frontend/src/data/navigationData.ts: TypeScript file exporting typed interfaces and a 3-level navigation tree with five Level-1 items, multiple Level-2 sub-items with descriptions, and Level-3 sub-sub-items.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor via React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind CSS, defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light/dark themes and custom nav header styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH color tokens, typography/display fonts, border radii, shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing a Nav Demo app with a responsive 3-level navigation header (desktop dropdowns + mobile hamburger), tracking implemented features and pending work items.
